name: Toffee Crunch Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 4 Toffee Candy Bars, crushed fine (3/4 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the butter into the flour and sugars until crumbly.
2. Set aside 1/2 cup of the remainder.
3. Add the remainder, buttermilk, soda, egg, and vanilla to a bowl; beat well.
4. Pour 1/3 of the batter into a well-greased and floured 9-cup Mini-Bundt pan.
5. Combine the reserved mixture, crushed candy, and nuts.
6. Sprinkle over the batter.
7. Alternate pouring the remaining batter and the candy nut mixture.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35-45 minutes.
To crush the candy bars:
1. Place them in the freezer until thoroughly chilled.
2. Once chilled, place between two sheets of foil and roll with a rolling pin.
